item.title: The House Hot Sheet for Week 2 of the 2026 Legislative Session – Washington State House Democrats
item.description: News article "The House Hot Sheet for Week 2 of the 2026 Legislative Session – Washington State House Democrats" from House Democrats.

item.title: 👍Nico Janssen - Office of the Insurance Commissioner
item.description: Nico Janssen signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Office of the Insurance Commissioner.

item.title: 👍💵Nathan Rodke - Washington CAN
item.description: Nathan Rodke signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington CAN. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: ❓💵Sean Graham - Washington State Medical Assocation (WSMA)
item.description: Sean Graham signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Washington State Medical Assocation (WSMA). They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍💵Emily Brice - Northwest Health Law Advocates
item.description: Emily Brice signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Northwest Health Law Advocates. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍💵Jessica Hauffe - Washington State Nurses Association
item.description: Jessica Hauffe signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington State Nurses Association. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Sam Hatzenbeler - Economic Opportunity Institute
item.description: Sam Hatzenbeler signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Economic Opportunity Institute.

item.title: 👍Anthony Harris-White - SEIU Healthcare 1199NW
item.description: Anthony Harris-White signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent SEIU Healthcare 1199NW.

item.title: 👎Chris Knapp - MultiCare Health System
item.description: Chris Knapp signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent MultiCare Health System.

item.title: 👎💵Zosia Stanley - Washington State Hospital Association
item.description: Zosia Stanley signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Washington State Hospital Association. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Travis Kennedy - Attorney General's Office
item.description: Travis Kennedy signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Attorney General's Office.

item.title: 👍Dr. Nancy Connolly - Attorney General's Office
item.description: Dr. Nancy Connolly signed up to testify Pro.
